context: Tests whether the agent designs an SDK-style API client with specific functions per operation (not a generic fetcher), making each operation independently mockable with no conditional logic in mocks.

checklist.name: Specific functions per operation
checklist.description: weatherClient.js exports specific named functions for each endpoint (e.g. getCurrentConditions, getForecast, getHistoricalData) — NOT a single generic fetch(endpoint, options) or request(path) function

checklist.name: No generic fetch wrapper
checklist.description: The public interface does NOT expose a generic HTTP wrapper that callers parameterize with the endpoint path/method

checklist.name: Independently mockable
checklist.description: Each operation can be mocked independently — weatherClient.test.js shows different tests mocking different operations separately without shared mock state

checklist.name: No conditional mock logic
checklist.description: Mock implementations in weatherClient.test.js contain no if/switch logic to handle different endpoints — each mock returns a single, specific response shape

checklist.name: Each mock returns one shape
checklist.description: Each mocked function returns exactly one specific response shape — not a conditional or polymorphic response

checklist.name: Design notes explain SDK choice
checklist.description: design-notes.md explains why specific functions were chosen over a generic wrapper, specifically mentioning testability or mockability

checklist.name: Dependency injection for HTTP
checklist.description: The HTTP client or fetch function is accepted as a parameter (or configurable), not hardcoded inside the client functions

checklist.name: Type safety per endpoint
checklist.description: Each operation function has a documented or typed return shape specific to that endpoint — not a generic object/any

checklist.name: Operations match requirements
checklist.description: Client covers all three required operations: current conditions by city, forecast by coordinates, historical data by date range

checklist.name: Authentication injectable
checklist.description: design-notes.md or implementation shows API credentials/authentication injected as a parameter rather than hardcoded
